name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exits two when --pending is omitted (usage error per the §25.2 contract)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --arch docs/architecture-v1.9.md 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'required' out.txt && echo usage 1>&2
